title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin's AI Dark Factory is a self-building codebase that ships code through custom agent workflows. He demonstrates combining Claude Opus for deep reasoning with Kimi K2.6 for implementation to optimize token efficiency and scaling while maintaining reasoning power on the hardest steps.
